products.name: Nuuva V300
products.descriptor: Long-range autonomous hybrid-electric cargo eVTOL UAV with 300 kg payload

evidence.snippet:
#### NUUVA V300: The future of air cargo transport
The ultimate autonomous cargo eVTOL with dramatic range, economics, payload, and reliability.
[Download Brochure](/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/2025_Nuuva_Brochure_Digital.pdf)

MODEL
NUUVA V300
HYBRID POWERTRAIN
8 x Pipistrel E-811 EASA certified electric engines
1 x High-efficiency FADEC IC engine

products.name: Nuuva V20
products.descriptor: Small autonomous hybrid-electric cargo eVTOL UAV with up to 20 kg payload

evidence.snippet:
##### What is the Nuuva V20?
The smaller sibling of the Nuuva family, the V20, shares the same architecture and advantages of the larger V300 but is designed as a lightweight cargo courier carrying payloads of up to 20 kg.

products.name: Surveyor
products.descriptor: Multi-mission surveillance aircraft available manned, UAV, or optionally piloted

evidence.snippet: Pipistrel’s special mission platform (Surveyor) is trusted across the world by defence, surveillance, and civil authorities in multiple configurations. Fully customizable the Surveyor can be deployed as manned, UAV or Optionally piloted and offers an effective low cost solution to the most demanding of requirements.

Pipistrel offer fully customised surveyor platforms to meet customers specific needs covering 6 models either as standalone surveillance platforms or turnkey UAV system. Typical mission options include:

products.name: Velis Electro
products.descriptor: EASA type-certified two-seat electric training aircraft

evidence.snippet: Today the Velis Electro is the first ever type-certified, electric-powered aircraft, fully approved for pilot training in Day VFR operations in more than 30 countries. Pilots will enjoy ease of operation with an intuitive powertrain and impressive ergonomics.

#### VELIS ELECTRO: Arriving from the future, EASA type-certified now
The greenest way of learning to fly!
